---
title: 'Almost There... 3... 2... 1... Go!'
date: '2017-02-21T14:45:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8827360795286967004'
blogger_filename: '/2017/02/almost-there-3-2-1-go.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'News & Updates'
---

<br />
Almost there... Almost ready to sell this house. We have a few things to finish then we can list the house for sale. Then the new adventure starts in Idaho.<br />
<br />
I don't know what to expect, only that things are so very, very, different now. My wife and I are in love, and communicating in ways I didn't know were possible. My heart is free in profound ways. My relationship with my boys has improved exponentially.<br />
<br />
And there is this... subtle... whisper? I have no words for it yet, but it's saying: "Come", or something to that effect. Coeur d'Alene, Idaho; here we come... almost.<br />
<br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18.0pt;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span> <span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant |&nbsp;</span><a href="https://www.ted.com/talks/emilie_wapnick_why_some_of_us_don_t_have_one_true_calling?language=en" style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Multipotentialite</a></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
